## Summary

A short, clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment

- Logic Layer version / commit SHA:
- OS:
- Component affected (middleware / verification layer / UI / scripts):
- Python / Node version (whichever is relevant):
- Deployment mode (local Docker / bare metal / CI):

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the **full** error traceback or log excerpt — no truncation.

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, paste logs, screenshots, or a screen recording. Drag-and-drop to attach.

## Possible cause

If you have a hunch about where the bug lives (claim extraction? trusted-source layer? specific connector?), say so. Not required.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and didn't find a duplicate.
- [ ] I can reproduce this on the latest `develop`.
- [ ] I have NOT included real API keys or secrets in this report.
